name: GPIBWriteNum
title: GPIBWriteNum
syntax: long GPIBWriteNum (long deviceDescriptor, char cmdStr[], double value);
description: Writes cmdStr + numeric value to the device.
The function returns immediately and does not wait for the end of the command transmission.

example.code: Setting of a voltage of 1.23 V: GPIBWriteStr(myDev, "V", 1.23)
